## utm-dev workspace list

List all modules in the workspace

### Synopsis

List all modules currently included in the Go workspace.

If no path is provided, searches from the current directory.

```
utm-dev workspace list [path] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for list
```
